mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_price_map ( coupon_id, platform, external_sku_id, title, manual_price, currency, enabled, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{couponId}, #{platform}, #{externalSkuId}, #{title}, #{manualPrice}, #{currency}, #{enabled}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_price_map SET external_sku_id = #{externalSkuId}, title = #{title}, manual_price = #{manualPrice}, currency = #{currency}, enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon_price_map WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM coupon_price_map WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND enabled = TRUE ORDER BY id
